name: skeft-qa
description: QA review agents for the SK_EFT_Hawking physics project (Stage 13). adversarial-reviewer: fresh-context paper audit against the readiness-gate taxonomy (citations, parameter provenance, placeholder theorems, cross-paper consistency, narrative overclaims). claims-reviewer: sentence-level prose audit with chain-of-backing + reconciliation across five finding classes. figure-reviewer: visual review of generated figures for rendering quality, physics accuracy, and style.
